EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user with ID {subject.account.id} is removing user group "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} with ID {subject.account.id} removed user group "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} with ID {subject.account.id} changed attributes of user group "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
